title: Henckelia lachenensis
intro: Henckelia lachenensis is a flowering plant species native to the Himalayan region, belonging to the Bignoniaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, contributing to its potential in treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Henckelia lachenensis include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. In traditional medicine, Henckelia lachenensis is commonly prepared as a decoction or a tincture, often used to treat respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders.
